---
name: Domain or practice issue
about: Report a missing or incorrect domain or practice
title: "[content] "
labels: ["content", "needs-triage"]
---

## What is wrong or missing?

Briefly describe the gap or error. Reference the file path under `content/domains/` or `content/practices/` if applicable.

## Why does it matter?

Who is affected and in which scenario?

## Proposed change

What should the domain or practice say or include? Cite at least one source from `content/sources.yaml` (or propose adding one).

## Checklist

- [ ] No real personal data in the description.
- [ ] At least one source proposed or referenced.
- [ ] Single concern (one domain or one practice per issue).
